Class MapPrinter

java.lang.Object
adventure_game.MapPrinter
public final class MapPrinter extends Object
Utility helper for rendering a textual representation of a level layout.

A map definition is expected to match the format used by data/levels/*.txt: the first non-comment line gives the room count, the next n lines define the rooms, and the following n lines describe exits for each room in the order East, North, West, South.

  • Method Details

    • renderFromRooms

      public static String renderFromRooms(List<Room> rooms)
      Renders a textual map description from an in-memory collection of Rooms. The rooms are assumed to be ordered in the same sequence in which they were created (typically as returned by Game.createMap(String)).
      Parameters:
      rooms - list of rooms that belong to the current level
      Returns:
      formatted map description
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if rooms is null

    • renderAsciiMap

      public static String renderAsciiMap(List<Room> rooms)
      Creates an ASCII rendering of the map derived from the given rooms.
      Parameters:
      rooms - list of rooms that compose the current level
      Returns:
      ASCII map representation

    • printAsciiMap

      public static void printAsciiMap(List<Room> rooms)
      Prints the ASCII map for rooms to standard output.
      Parameters:
      rooms - list of rooms that compose the current level
